description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat, overhanging roof and a sleek, minimalist design. The front features a large patio area with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and landscaped grass strips. Expansive glass windows and sliding doors dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The rear side includes a driveway with multiple parked cars and a secondary entrance, as well as visible outdoor storage elements. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with clean lines and a neutral color palette. The overall layout emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and contemporary architectural aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a front patio with a pool, and a driveway with parked cars. The design is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main patio, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and large glass windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, patio, and partial driveway with cars visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway with multiple cars, secondary entrance, and outdoor storage elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and additional outdoor seating areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, large glass doors, and a covered patio area; minimalistic and open with no ornate decorations.
